query:
SELECT a.id, a.titulo, a.prazo, a.status, CURDATE() as hoje, 
       DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.prazo) as dias_vencido,
       a.prazo < CURDATE() as esta_vencida
FROM actions a
WHERE a.id = 420007 OR a.titulo LIKE '%Marketing Interno%'
ORDER BY a.prazo;
